LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF RICK SLATER CONSTRUCTION, INC'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-13-535249 WITH CASE CGC-13-536193 IS GRANTED FOR TRIAL PURPOSES. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION DEMONSTRATES THAT THE CASES CONCERN COMMON ISSUES OF LAW AND FACT UNDER 1048(A), THAT CONSOLIDATION PROMOTES JUDICIAL ECONOMY, AND THAT CONSOLIDATION WILL AVOID INCONSISTENT ADJUDICATIONS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR5976

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-13-535249 WITH CASE CGC-13-536193
Off Calendar Jan-23-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: SCOTT GLASSMOYER, ESQ., 925.988.3245, FOR DEFENDANT W.L. BUTLER CONSTRUCTION, INC.; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RICK SLATER CONSTRUCTION, INC's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-13-535249 WITH CASE CGC-13-536193 is granted for trial purposes. Plaintiff's motion demonstrates that the cases concern common issues of law and fact under 1048(a), that consolidation promotes judicial economy, and that consolidation will avoid inconsistent adjudications. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

Statement Of Non Opposition And Joinder To Plaintiff'S Motion To Consolidate
Off Calendar Jan-23-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: SCOTT GLASSMOYER, ESQ., 925.988.3245, FOR DEFENDANT W.L. BUTLER CONSTRUCTION, INC.; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT W.L, BUTLER CONSTRUCTION, INC'S Joinder To Plaintiff'S Motion To Consolidate ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-13-535249 AND CGC-13-536193 is granted for trial purposes. Plaintiff's motion demonstrates that the cases concern common issues of law and fact under 1048(a), that consolidation promotes judicial economy, and that consolidation will avoid inconsistent adjudications. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
